Saving a Sales Return automatically creates a Credit Note ledger entry (reduces party's outstanding balance) and adds the returned quantity back into Stock (matched by item name).

☁️ Cloud Sync (Firebase — Live)
Connecting…
Fully automatic — every save syncs to the cloud within a couple seconds, and updates from other devices appear here live, with no button or refresh needed.
Advanced / troubleshooting
Note: PDF invoices & attached documents are NOT included in cloud sync (too large for the free database) — use JSON Backup for those.

💾 Backup Settings
Off
Browser Download Location: Backups are downloaded by your browser. To always save to a specific folder:
• Chrome: Settings → Downloads → Change location
• Firefox: Settings → Downloads → Save files to
• Edge: Settings → Downloads → Download location

⚠️ Browser security prevents direct folder writing. Set your browser's download path to always save here.
🖥️ Display / UI Settings
🎨 Quick Theme Switch
Switches instantly and saves automatically
🧾 Invoice / Tax Settings
Controls the row order in all downloaded PDF reports.
📦 Stock / Balance Settings
⚠️ Danger Zone
This permanently deletes ALL data (records, ledger, cheques, parties, contacts, digital invoices, rate lists, everything). Requires Admin password to confirm — protects against accidental clicks.
🔒 Owner-only master control. Turning this ON gives you full enable/disable control over every module in the app, plus edit/delete access on entries that don't normally show it, and a recoverable Trash for anything deleted anywhere. Every single action inside asks for your admin password again — nothing here happens silently. When this switch is OFF, the app behaves exactly as it does today for everyone, including you.
🧩 Modules — Enable / Disable (hides the tab for everyone until you turn it back on)
🗑️ Trash / Recycle Bin
Anything deleted anywhere in the app (records, ledger, parties, cheques, stock, etc.) is captured here before it's gone for good. Restore it back to where it came from, or purge it permanently — each needs your password.
✅ Approval Workflow
When enabled, new records in that module require sequential approval (Staff → Manager → Accounts → Director) before being usable/ready. A Purchase Order can't be received until fully approved. Assign each user's approval role from Security → Manage Users.
🔢 Auto Number Generator
Configure prefix, start number & digit padding for each document type. Click the 🔢 button next to a number field anywhere in the app to auto-generate the next number — no manual typing.
🗄️ Advanced Backup & Version History
📋 Version History (stored on this device)
☁️ Cloud Backup Connections
Google Drive is wired up for real automatic backup (like Firebase live sync). OneDrive/Dropbox/NAS still need their own API credentials before I can connect them.
📁
Google Drive
Not connected
One-time setup: create a free OAuth Client ID in Google Cloud Console (APIs & Services → Credentials → Create OAuth Client ID → Web application, add this page's URL under Authorized JavaScript origins), then paste it below.

📎 Digital Invoices — PDF Library
🗂️ Folder Auto-Import (computer link)
Link a folder on your computer once. After that, one click will scan that folder (and all its sub-folders) and auto-import every PDF's data — no need to select files one by one each time. ⚠️ Your browser doesn't support folder linking — this needs Chrome or Edge on desktop.
No folder linked yet.
🔍 FBR Invoice Number Search
#File NameInvoice No / DC NoFBR Invoice NoLink StatusPartyImport DateActions
How it works: Import PDF invoice files (multiple at once) → System reads each PDF and auto-extracts Invoice #, DC #, PO #, FBR Invoice #, Party Name → Auto-links to matching DC records → Files persist permanently (saved in browser's IndexedDB) until you manually delete them, even after refresh or restart → Included in JSON backup/restore.
🏆 Top Searched Items
👥 Recent Parties
📋 Rate Lists — Search & Add to Basket
📂 Saved Quotations
Sr#DatePartyItemsTotalActions
📄 Item Descriptions Master List
Har DC/Quotation mein jo bhi description use hoti hai, wo automatically yahan add ho jati hai — naye bhi manually add kar sakte hain. Jahan bhi Description field ho (DC, Quotation, etc.), wahan search karne par yehi list se suggestions ayengi.
DescriptionHS CodeUOMUsed InActions
📨 Party Lookup — Dispatch, Transport & Envelope
How it works: Type a party name to instantly see: address, contact/attention persons with phone numbers, transport/cargo adda (Pay/To-Pay status), and a ready-to-print envelope. Click "Envelope Print" for live preview and 1-click printing. All editable — click "Add Party Info" for a new party or "Edit" on any result.
🔢 Multi-Invoice DCs
DCs with 2 or more invoice numbers (e.g. 522/523) — click to edit and set per-item invoice
🚚 Courier / Dispatch Management
DateDC NoPartyCourierBilty/TrackingWeightCartonsFreightDelivery DatePODStatus
📜 Bilty History — Per Party
📨 Envelope Dispatch — Leopard Courier
Separate from goods dispatch above — for envelopes (invoices, documents, etc.) sent via Leopard Courier. Tracking number and payment/COD are entered manually since Leopard is booked outside this system.
DatePartyContentsTracking NoPayment (COD)Receiver / PODStatus

➕ New Envelope Dispatch

🗓️ Daily Attendance — Quick Mark
🧾 Monthly Salary Slips
Only Absent days reduce salary (per-day rate = Base Salary ÷ days in month). Leave days are paid, same as Present. Bonus adds to net pay; Advance is deducted (since it was already paid out).
EmployeePresentAbsentLeaveBase SalaryDeductionBonusAdvanceNet Payable
Select a month and click Generate.

📦 Complete Stock Module
Reserved = portion of current stock balance earmarked for open party Purchase Orders. Pending PO = total ordered-but-not-dispatched qty across open POs (⚠️ shows if it exceeds what's on hand). Both update automatically as POs/DCs change.
ItemCategoryOpeningPurchaseSaleBalanceReservedPending POWarehouseRack/Bin

🤖 AI Search — Ask in Plain Words
Runs fully on this device (no external AI service / no data leaves your computer). Understands: month names, "pending", "unpaid", "paid", party/item names, courier names, cheque amounts, invoice/DC numbers.

📷 OCR Auto-Fill — Scan Invoice

Upload a photo or scan of an invoice/DC (image or PDF). The system reads the text on-device and tries to detect key fields — nothing is uploaded to any server. Review the detected values before applying.
